prestazioni: Engine swap to a BMW N63B44T3 4.4L twin-turbo V8 (from the F90 M5 Competition), retaining the original Morgan aluminum chassis but reinforcing the engine mounts with custom CNC-machined billet aluminum mounts from KW Automotive, paired with a Getrag 7DCI700 7-speed dual-clutch transmission and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (380mm) for 650Nm torque capacity

Forced induction upgrade using a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (1.15 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegate, mated to a CSF Racing aluminum radiator (part #7030) and a Setrab 50-row oil cooler (part #2050-50-22121) to manage the N63’s heat soak under track conditions

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins TTX46 coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 200mm travel) paired with custom rose-jointed front and rear wishbones from RML Group, reinforced with spherical bearings from Aurora Bearing (part #AMG-16T), and a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) to counteract the Plus Eight’s 52/48 weight distribution
estetica: Custom carbon fiber body panels (front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser) from Vorsteiner’s bespoke division, designed specifically for the Plus Eight’s hand-formed aluminum body, with a 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap over the original ash wood frame to preserve the classic aesthetic while reducing weight

Bespoke 18x9.5-inch front and 18x11-inch rear forged aluminum wheels from HRE (model FF16, 3-piece construction) with a custom offset (ET20 front, ET15 rear) to clear the Öhlins coilovers and N63’s wider track, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/40/18 front, 305/35/18 rear) for track-focused grip

Aerodynamic package featuring a custom-made carbon fiber rear wing from 9 Lives Racing (adjustable angle of attack, 1,200mm width) mounted on a steel subframe welded to the Morgan’s ash frame, paired with a custom front canard set from APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece) to balance downforce at high speeds
